title: Tunica glumacea
taxonomy: Tunica glumacea is classified in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the order Asterales. It is native to Mexico and Central America, where it grows as a perennial herb. The species name 'glumacea' refers to the plant's glumous or papery bracts. Further classification of Tunica glumacea may involve its genus and species classification within the Campanulaceae family.
